The Studio

A world of
possibilities.

At NM Aesthetics, we specialize in transforming spaces into a true reflection of your unique style. With a passion for design and a keen eye for detail, every room we touch becomes beautiful, functional, and deeply personal.

Whether you're refreshing a single room or reimagining your entire home, our personalized approach tailors every project to your vision — blending elegance with practicality to elevate everyday life.

Dream Spaces
The Vision

Earthy. Minimalist.
Modern.

Every project starts with a custom design direction — a mood board that captures your personality, a color palette that feels like home, and a furniture selection that balances beauty with function.

Nicole's signature style blends warm neutrals, organic textures, and intentional decor to create spaces that feel effortlessly curated.

Warm Neutrals Organic Texture Minimalist Modern Classic Earthy Tones
Offerings

Choose Your Experience

Three packages designed around the level of support your home deserves.

01 — Full Service

The Styling Experience

Starting at $1,000 / space

For those who want the magic touch — I handle everything from vision to the final finishing touch.

  • Custom inspo board
  • Curated sourcing
  • Installation + finishing touches
  • Personalized project hub
  • Limited spots available
Book Now
02 — Most Popular

Virtual Design Refresh

Starting at $550 / space

Professional design direction — you shop and install on your own schedule.

  • Custom mood board
  • Scaled floor plan
  • Curated shopping list
  • One full revision
  • Available anywhere
Start My Design
03 — In Person

Designer For A Day

Message for quote

A full space refresh in 24–48 hours. I visit, source locally, then install and style everything.

  • In-person walkthrough
  • Local sourcing trip
  • Same or next-day styling
  • Complete install included
  • Raleigh / surrounding areas
Request Quote
Virtual Design

Transform your home —
from anywhere.

No matter where you live, I can bring your dream space to life. My virtual service is fully remote — all you need to do is share your space and your vision.

  • ✓
    Custom Layout Plan A functional, stylish layout that maximizes every square foot.
  • ✓
    Perfect Color Palette Colors curated to your personality, lighting, and aesthetic goals.
  • ✓
    Personalized Shopping List Every item handpicked for your budget — no scrolling required.

Meet Your Designer

Hi, I'm Nicole Marie — let's bring your dream space to life.

Nicole Jimenez · Professional Interior Decorator · DESIGNIP 2023

For over a decade, I've worked in the fashion and styling industry, helping people express themselves through what they wear. But for me, style has always gone beyond clothing — it's about creating a feeling.

That's why I followed my passion for home design. Your home is more than a place. It's your sanctuary, your escape, a reflection of who you are.

The right space should embrace you, inspire you, and make you feel at peace the moment you walk through the door.

"Let's make your home the most beautiful reflection of you." Work With Me
